name_cn:
Platinum Edition▪️ Authentic Quality | Packaging as shown
Chane1 24B New Pocket Bag
Purchased from the counter for 35,500 RMB
The trendy highlight of this year's new arrivalsꫛꫀꪝ
Named after the year number❏
Aim for it!! Chane1 22 Handbag〰️"Garbage Bag♥"
I love every color!
This grass is growing so fast I can't keep up🤷‍♂

it just fits the vibe perfectly🪄
There are too many images, it's really popular.
Celebrities and supermodels are wearing the same style👀 The trend is catching on!
The more I look, the more I love it!!

Leather: Glossy calfskin
Size: 35*37*7 cm
